Source.Name: drmdecrypt
Source.Summary: drmdecrypt is a tool to decrypt PVR recordings from Samsung TVs into standard transport stream format.
Source.Description: drmdecrypt is a tool to decrypt PVR recordings from Samsung TVs into standard transport stream format.

Package.Name: drmdecrypt
Package.Summary: drmdecrypt is a tool to decrypt PVR recordings from Samsung TVs into standard transport stream format.
Package.Description: drmdecrypt is a tool to decrypt PVR recordings from Samsung TVs into standard transport stream format.
